Container.Name: LLMPricing
Container.Overview:
LLM Pricing Mirror — Live chart tracking LLM intelligence (ELO) vs cost per million tokens.
Auto-refreshes every Sunday at 02:00 UTC from GitHub, keeping ELO scores, pricing data, and narrative cards up to date.
The Docker image is built automatically by GitHub Actions and published to ghcr.io. No manual rebuilds needed.
Hosted at http://YOUR-UNRAID-IP:PORT after installation.
CODE CHANGES (optional — requires fork & token): 1. This repo is YOUR fork of sanand0/llmpricing. 2. Set GITHUB_TOKEN, FORK_OWNER, GIT_USER_NAME, GIT_USER_EMAIL below. 3. Dobby pushes edits directly to the fork — the container pulls them on the next update cycle (or immediately on restart).

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: Host port for the web interface. Default: 8080

Config.Name: GitHub Token
Config.Description: Classic PAT with repo scope. Set this + FORK_OWNER to enable push access for code changes.

Config.Name: Fork Owner
Config.Description: Your GitHub username (the fork owner). Only needed if you want Dobby to push code changes.

Config.Name: Git User Name
Config.Description: Name for git commits (e.g. Dobby Bot)

Config.Name: Source Code Volume
Config.Description: Persistent volume so code changes survive container rebuilds. Map to /mnt/user/appdata/llmpricing/repo
